# Required GitHub Actions Secrets

> This file is generated by `pnpm secrets:check` -- do not edit by hand.
> Re-run whenever you add or remove an SDK import.

Each secret below is required by at least one vendor SDK currently imported in `lib/` or `app/`.
Add them at: `Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions` in your GitHub repository.

| Vendor | Env Vars | Used By Jobs | Create Key |
|--------|----------|--------------|------------|
| AssemblyAI | `ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY` | `live-integrations`, `api-smoke` | [console](https://www.assemblyai.com/app) |
| Deepgram | `DEEPGRAM_API_KEY` | `live-integrations` | [console](https://console.deepgram.com) |
| Supabase | `SUPABASE_URL`<br/>`SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`<br/>`SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | `e2e`, `api-smoke` | [console](https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/_/settings/api) |
| Vercel AI Gateway | `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` | `ai-evals` | [console](https://vercel.com/dashboard/integrations/ai-gateway) |
| Stripe | `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` | `e2e` | [console](https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys) |

## Why these are needed

- **Live integration tests** use `it.skipIf(!process.env.KEY)` so missing secrets skip cleanly -- tests pass but do not actually verify anything.
- **API route smoke tests** require real backends for any route that calls a vendor. Missing keys surface as a 500 in `tests/api/route-smoke.test.ts`, caught by CI.
- **Nightly runs** exercise every vendor; if a vendor breaks their API at 3am, the job fails by 6am.
